meta.title: Moorea Hub — Te uira parau no te fenua Moorea
meta.description: Te mau parau āpī, te mau ʻōro'a, te mau parau e te mau parau au no Moorea i te taime mau. Mata'i, tai, ferry, fare tāmā'ara'a e te mau mea ē ato'a.

hero.badge: Te mau parau ato'a no Moorea i te hō'ē vāhi
hero.title: Ia ora na, mānava i Moorea
hero.subtitle: Te uira parau no te fenua tuahine. Te mau ʻōro'a, te mau fa'aaraara'a, te mata'i, te ferry, te tai e te mau mea ē ato'a — fa'aāpīhia i te taime mau.

news.title: Te parau matamua
news.subtitle: Te mau parau āpī no Moorea

events.title: ʻŌro'a no muri
events.subtitle: Te tupu nei i te fenua i teie tāpati

submit.title: E parau tā ōe e fa'a'ite ?
submit.subtitle: Vauvau noa i tā ōe ʻōro'a, fa'aaraara'a aore rā 'ohipa. ʻIte i raro a'e i te 24 hora.

newsletter.title: Ia parahi māramarama
newsletter.subtitle: ʻOhi i te ʻā tāpati i te mau parau matamua no Moorea i roto i tā ōe puta rāta.
newsletter.consent: I tā ōe pāpa'ira'a tā ōe e farii i tā mātou mau rāta. Hō'ē tāhe noa nō te fa'aore.
newsletter.success: Māuruuru ! Ua hāʻamauhia tā ōe pāpa'ira'a.

footer.tagline: Te uira parau no te fenua tuahine, no te feiā e te mau ratere o Moorea.

submit.title: Vauvau hō'ē parau
submit.subtitle: Tu'u i tā ōe ʻōro'a, fa'aaraara'a aore rā 'ohipa i te fenua tā'ato'a. ʻAore moni, vitiviti, ʻite i raro a'e i te 24 hora.

form.title: Tāpa'o
form.name: Tā ōe iʻoa
form.imageHint: JPG aore rā PNG, 5 Mo i ni'a a'e
form.consent: Tē farii nei vau e tu'uhia teie parau i ni'a i te Moorea Hub i muri a'e te ʻitera'a.

success.title: Māuruuru !
success.body: Ua fariihia tā ōe vauvaura'a. E ʻite mātou i raro a'e i te 24 hora e e fa'atae mātou hō'ē email iā ōe.
